text.title: Accessibility Annotation Pattern Library Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: inventory-archetypes
step.action: List every interactive component, classify into one of the 8 archetypes.

step.name: load-snippet-library
step.action: Pick the snippet for each archetype.

step.name: instantiate-annotations
step.action: Fill name_pattern with actual labels; specify states present on this screen.

step.name: cross-screen-focus-order
step.action: Number focus order across modals, drawers, and toasts; verify reading order matches DOM order.
step.decision-gate: If focus order cannot be expressed without ambiguity, decompose the screen.

step.name: emit-handoff-doc
step.action: Run `templates/handoff-doc.md` template renderer; produce dev-readable resolution doc.
